summary: Iteration 33: Bug Fixes Verification - All 23 Tests Passed (100%). Verified all critical bug fixes: 1) Basketball prop type normalization (VALID_BASKETBALL_PROPS includes reb_ast, pts_reb, pts_ast, blk_stl, steals, blocks, turnovers), 2) Basketball prop alias mapping (rebs+asts correctly maps to reb_ast NOT pts_reb_ast), 3) Basketball stat extraction (get_stat_value for reb_ast returns rebounds+assists), 4) Basketball opponent resolution with league_id filter (prevents NBA vs WNBA cross-match), 5) Soccer/Basketball prediction opponent field force-set from request data, 6) No AI model names in user-facing text (uses 'Cross-referenced sources' not 'Grok'), 7) Frontend opponent fallback uses resolvedOpponent?.teamId || 0.
passed_tests: GET /api/health returns 200 with status=ok
VALID_BASKETBALL_PROPS includes reb_ast, pts_reb, pts_ast, blk_stl, steals, blocks, turnovers
BASKETBALL_PROP_ALIASES: 'rebs+asts' maps to 'reb_ast' (NOT pts_reb_ast)
BASKETBALL_PROP_ALIASES: 'blks+stls' maps to 'blk_stl'
BASKETBALL_PROP_ALIASES: 'pts+reb' maps to 'pts_reb'
BASKETBALL_PROP_ALIASES: 'pts+ast' maps to 'pts_ast'
get_stat_value for reb_ast returns rebounds + assists
get_stat_value for pts_reb returns points + rebounds
get_stat_value for blk_stl returns blocks + steals
Opponent resolution passes league_id to get_bball_team_by_name
Cross-league rejection logic is present (prevents NBA vs WNBA cross-match)
basketball_cache.py get_bball_team_by_name accepts league_id parameter
Soccer prediction force-sets opponent from request (prediction['opponent'] = req.opponentName)
Basketball prediction force-sets opponent from request
Soccer prediction force-sets player from request data
No 'Grok' in dataQuality messages
Data quality message uses 'Cross-referenced sources used for analysis'
No AI model names in basketball dataQuality messages
Frontend uses pickData.resolvedOpponent?.teamId || 0 for opponentId
BBALL_STAT_FIELD_MAP correctly maps compound props to None
BBALL_PROP_LABELS includes all required prop types
picks.py get_bball_stat_value handles reb_ast correctly
picks.py bball_props set includes all required props
critical_code_review_comments: scan.py VALID_BASKETBALL_PROPS (line ~26-31) correctly includes all compound props: reb_ast, pts_reb, pts_ast, blk_stl, steals, blocks, turnovers
scan.py BASKETBALL_PROP_ALIASES (line ~33-67) correctly maps 'rebs+asts' to 'reb_ast' (NOT pts_reb_ast)
scan.py _resolve_basketball_picks (line ~461-490) passes league_id to get_bball_team_by_name for opponent resolution, preventing NBA vs WNBA cross-match
basketball_predict.py get_stat_value (line ~88-116) correctly computes compound stats: reb_ast=rebounds+assists, pts_reb=points+rebounds, blk_stl=blocks+steals
basketball_predict.py (line ~971-972) force-sets prediction['player'] and prediction['opponent'] from request data
predict.py (line ~1139-1145) force-sets prediction['player'] and prediction['opponent'] from request data
predict.py (line ~1241) uses 'Cross-referenced sources used for analysis' instead of AI model names
basketball_cache.py get_bball_team_by_name (line ~249) accepts league_id parameter and filters by it
Frontend App.js (line ~594) correctly uses pickData.resolvedOpponent?.teamId || 0 for opponentId
context_for_next_testing_agent: All bug fixes from this iteration are VERIFIED. Key fixes: 1) Prop type misidentification fixed - 'rebs+asts' now correctly maps to 'reb_ast' (not pts_reb_ast), 2) Cross-league opponent matching fixed - league_id is passed to get_bball_team_by_name preventing NBA vs WNBA cross-match, 3) Opponent name display fixed - prediction['opponent'] is force-set from req.opponentName (not setdefault), 4) AI model names removed from user-facing text - uses 'Cross-referenced sources' instead of 'Grok'.

prop_type_misidentification.issue: Rebs+Asts was mapped to pts_reb_ast instead of reb_ast

cross_league_opponent_matching.issue: NBA team could match vs WNBA team (e.g., Pistons vs Storm)
cross_league_opponent_matching.fix: get_bball_team_by_name now accepts league_id parameter, scan.py passes league_id for opponent resolution

opponent_name_literal_text.issue: Opponent name showing as literal 'Opponent' text

ai_model_names_in_ui.issue: AI model names (Grok) leaking into user-facing UI text
ai_model_names_in_ui.fix: dataQuality message uses 'Cross-referenced sources used for analysis' instead of 'Grok'
